name: Mild Fish Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1/3 pound fish filet (mild), such as turbot
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine chicken broth, water, potatoes, rice, carrots, and dillweed.
2. In a skillet, melt margarine. Saute leeks and green onions until soft. Mix flour until smooth and remove from heat.
3. Add the leek-flour mixture to the soup. Simmer the soup until the potatoes are fully cooked (about 20 minutes).
4. Stir in corn, fish, tuna, and tuna liquid. Cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the fish is fully cooked.
